calculation.coverage: fraction of module supports greater than 0
calculation.mean_support: mean of the five module supports
calculation.module_calibrated_formula: effective_coverage = min(1, coverage / 0.80); min(sigmoid(effective_coverage, center=0.90, scale=0.05), sigmoid(mean_support, center=0.0, scale=0.015), sigmoid(p10_support, center=-0.02, scale=0.015))
calculation.p10_support: 10th percentile of the five module supports
calculation.raw_transfer_formula: min(sigmoid(coverage, center=0.90, scale=0.05), sigmoid(mean_support, center=0.0, scale=0.015), sigmoid(p10_support, center=-0.02, scale=0.015))

default_metrics.caveat: Recommended calibrated probability-like score; rescales 5-module coverage before applying the same soft-min gates.

excluded_columns_note: Label-aware isotonic apparent calibration columns are excluded from the public probability table.

raw_transfer_metrics.caveat: Exact cohort-selected formula; under-calibrated on the 5-module patient surface.
